deduplication_note: The repeated q17_clients question was included once.

questions.question:
Assume SERVEROUTPUT is ON. Given table q17_clients with the columns client_id, first_name, last_name, credit_limit. It contains exactly one row with client_id=10, first_name='Ada', last_name='Lovelace', and credit_limit=500.

What will this block display?

Assume SERVEROUTPUT is ON. Given table q17_students with the columns student_id, first_name, last_name, points. It contains exactly these rows: student_id=1 has points=80, student_id=2 has points=NULL, and student_id=3 has points=60.

What will this block display?
questions.note: The pasted text omitted student_id from the column list, but the rows and code both use student_id. The executable version includes student_id.

questions.question: Which statement about DML triggers is correct?

answers.label: a
answers.text: A statement-level trigger fires once for the triggering DML statement, even if the statement affects no rows.

answers.label: b
answers.text: An INSTEAD OF trigger can be created only on ordinary tables, not on views.

answers.label: d
answers.text: A row-level trigger fires once for the triggering DML statement, regardless of how many rows are affected.

answers.label: e
answers.text: OLD and NEW values are available in statement-level triggers exactly as in row-level triggers.

questions.question:
Assume SERVEROUTPUT is ON. Given table q17_projects with the columns project_id, project_code, status. It contains exactly three rows: two rows have status='NEW' and one row has status='DONE'.

What will this block display?

answers.label: c
answers.text: The first NEW project_id is displayed.

questions.question:
Assume SERVEROUTPUT is ON. Given table q17_invoices with the columns customer_code, invoice_amount, paid_flag. It contains rows only for customer_code='C1'.

What will this block display?

Assume SERVEROUTPUT is ON. Given table q17_codes with the columns code_id, code_text, priority. It contains at least one row.

What is true about this block?

answers.label: e
answers.text: It raises NO_DATA_FOUND at run time.

What will this block display?
